name: Matrix OS: Arcade Evolution
short_description: Matrix OS is an experimental game engine of its own kind, where creators and curious players can test game projects of all types and progressive stages, free to mod and play independently with python and more. Arcade Evolution contains a virtual game hub driven by lore based on The Utopia Project.
detailed_description:
Matrix OS: Arcade Evolution

"During the creation of The Utopia Project

[An isolated island-metropolis that can only be seen with nano-technology]

A virtual space dimension was created within its Central Hub.

Wars between hackers broke out when an exploit was found in one of the hub realms

which ultimately led to the destruction of the Central Hub to stop the exploit.

A rogue bot named IO-88, was programmed to archive the remaining data

and wait for the arrival of the creator who never returned...

Whoever finds IO-88 will be granted access to all that was left behind.

This includes access to the Central Hub without living in that forsaken Utopia!"

- GLITCHED MATRIX

Matrix OS is a virtual “operating system” simulation built in Python, designed as a creator-first desktop where you can launch modules, run tools, and build a library of experiences without needing a traditional engine pipeline.

It’s not real virtualization—think of it as a playable, nostalgic OS layer that acts like a VM desktop and focuses on making Python-based projects feel like apps inside a unified “Matrix” environment.

A desktop for creators (including non-coders)

Matrix OS is built to encourage and teach new content creators with simplified tools made from primarily python coding with the use of panda3d and various built-in plugins.

Creators who do code can go much further: Matrix OS is friendly to Python game/tool development workflows (Pygame today, Panda3D-friendly by design).

What you can do right now

-Launch customizable “apps/games” from a virtual desktop or even your own without the launcher! You don't even need the OS to play these games. But I highly recommend using it until the games are completely finished. Its built for just that.

-Play up 40+ Prototypes: You can test, modify, and play simulations of all types. All files are non-encrypted and free to redistribute. All I ask is to give credit (only where it's due).. And we do update periodically.

-Join a Nostalgic chatroom with 8 python bots capable of problem solving and engaging in multiplayer minigames created by the bots (A work in progress). 

-Built-in utilities: 2d/3d world editors/generators, animators, and many more apps to play around with.

Arcade Evolution is where inventions are made.

Why Matrix OS exists

Matrix OS is meant to feel like a nostalgic virtual machine—a place where tools, games, bots, and projects live together in one “operating system” experience. The long-term vision is an expanding ecosystem of creator-friendly modules, templates, and guided workflows so anyone can build and share content—even starting from zero coding knowledge.

Early Access note

Matrix OS is actively evolving. Expect ongoing improvements to stability, creator workflows, more built-in tools, more customization, and deeper project templates as the platform grows. You are the team!

name: Diggin It
short_description: Dig, upgrade, and take risky buffs in this chaotic tunnel adventure! Team up with your loyal cat and dog companions, discover powerful upgrades, and decide how far you're willing to push your luck while digging deeper and deeper.
detailed_description:
Dig deep. Get stronger. Push your luck.

Diggin' It is a humorous upgrade-driven digging adventure where every shovel hit gets you closer to riches… or disaster.

Start with basic tools and a dream, then dig your way through mysterious underground layers filled with treasures, secrets, and strange hazards. Along the way, you’ll unlock powerful upgrades, discover risky buffs, and rely on your faithful animal companions to help you survive the depths.

🐾 You’re Not Digging Alone

Bring along your helpful (and sometimes chaotic) companions:

  • Your clever Cat helps you discover valuable items and hidden upgrades.

  • Your loyal Dog boosts your digging efficiency and helps recover resources.

Together, you’ll become the ultimate tunnel team.

⚙️ Upgrade Everything

Turn your humble digging operation into a treasure-hunting powerhouse.

  • Improve tools and equipment

  • Unlock new digging abilities

  • Discover rare gadgets and enhancements

  • Customize your playstyle with different upgrade paths

Every run lets you grow stronger and dig deeper.

⚠️ Risky Buffs, Big Rewards

Feeling lucky?

Find special buffs that give huge advantages… but come with hilarious and dangerous handicaps.

You might gain massive digging speed while your vision blurs, or uncover incredible treasures while dealing with unpredictable effects. Choosing when to take risks is key to mastering the depths.

🌎 Explore The Unknown

Each layer tunnel introduces:

  • New environments

  • Strange hazards and surprises

  • Hidden rewards and secrets

  • Increasing challenges the deeper you go

There’s always something new waiting below.

🎮 Features

  • Addictive upgrade progression

  • Risk vs reward buff system

  • Companion pets that actively assist gameplay

  • Humor-filled tunnel adventure

If you love progression-based games, silly chaos, and the satisfaction of constant upgrades, Diggin' It will keep you digging for just one more run.

name: Trigger of Silence
short_description: "Trigger of Silence" is a first-person survival defense game that combines intense melee combat with firearms. In this invaded world, you play as a super soldier tasked with holding your ground and fending off waves of dragon-like creatures.
detailed_description:
《Trigger of Silence》 is a first-person survival defense game that combines intense melee combat with gunplay. In this invaded world, you play as a super soldier who must hold your ground and fend off waves of dragon-like humanoid creatures.

Powerful Weapons

The game features very unique weapons. Each weapon can use skill cartridges to unleash powerful abilities, dealing devastating damage to groups of monsters.

Tower Defense System

Some weapons can use skill cartridges to summon automated turrets, adding tower defense elements.

Wave Attacks! Advance!

Large numbers of enemies will attack at set intervals, and players must eliminate hordes of monsters to survive. During the advance, certain levels require players to drive vehicles to sweep through large groups of monsters and enter monster nests to defeat the bosses.

Story Background

In 2040, a laboratory secretly conducted portal experiments. After opening a portal, a humanoid glowing figure emerged, immediately taking control of the portal and bringing a large number of monsters. After the lab sent out a distress signal, you, as a super soldier, are sent by your superiors to investigate the laboratory, eliminate all monsters encountered along the way, and eventually uncover who brought the monsters and what their purpose is.

name: VTS Face2Face
short_description: Face2Face connects to VTube Studio and lets your face trigger expressions, items, scenes, and even switch models in real time. Build simple rules that trigger with facial tracking, use toggle or auto-off modes, and skip hotkeys entirely. Fast setup, low resource usage, compatible with however you use VTube Studio today!
detailed_description:
Ever wanted a simplistic app to control your VTuber with nothing but your face? Me too!

I know other apps do similar things too, but I wanted something simple, intuitive, and user friendly.

Face2Face connects directly to VTube Studio and triggers expressions, item scenes and more. Your face controls, well, your face!

How it works:

  • You set up rules like "when my mouth opens wide, activate the surprised expression"

  • The app watches the tracking parameters in real time

  • When your face matches a condition, it fires the expression, item scene, or any hotkey in VTube Studio

  • Continuous Mode: When your face goes back to normal, the expression turns off automatically

  • Toggle Mode: Ever wanted to wink and put on sunglasses, then wink again to toggle them off? Me either, but now you can!

Features:

  • Automatic setup for quick and easy rule creation, manual creation for complicated rules or fine-tuning

  • Works with any VTube Studio setup, whether you track with a webcam, iPhone, Android, or any other setup

  • Use expressions, hotkeys and even change models with nothing but your face

  • Control hold time, release time so your rules fire exactly how you want them to when you want them to

  • Live parameter monitor so you see exactly what your face is doing

  • Set different rules per model and quickly import rules between models

  • Supports 31 languages

Setup takes about 60 seconds. Open VTube Studio, enable the API, launch Face2Face, hit connect, and start making rules.

Built by a lone VTuber who got tired of having to reach over and press buttons to control my facial expressions

Requirements:

  • This app requires VTube Studio to function

  • Works with webcam, iPhone, Android, or any other device

  • Works on any computer that can run VTube Studio, very very light on CPU and RAM to run

⚠️ VTS Face2Face is only as good as your tracking is in VTube Studio and VBridger. If VTube Studio and/or VBridger has trouble tacking your face, so will VTS Face2Face!!!

name: Chess AI
short_description: A chess game featuring an adaptive AI opponent that scales to your skill level. Analyze your games move-by-move, track your improvement with detailed statistics, and unlock cosmetics for your avatar, board, and pieces as you progress. Original soundtrack by The Teps. No in-app purchases.
detailed_description:
Master the Royal Game

Challenge yourself against an AI that adapts to your skill level — perfect for beginners learning the ropes and veterans seeking a real challenge.

Analyze & Improve

Review your games move-by-move. See where you played brilliantly and where you blundered, with best move suggestions to help you learn.

Level Up Your Style

Track your progress, unlock new boards and piece sets, and customize your avatar with unique clothing and accessories as you climb the ranks.

Features

  • 🎯 Multiple AI difficulty levels

  • 📊 Post-game analysis with move quality ratings

  • 📈 Statistics and progression system

  • 🎨 Unlockable cosmetics for your character, board, and pieces

  • 🎵 Original soundtrack by The Teps

  • 🌍 Multi-language support

  • 💰 No in-app purchases — one payment, full game

name: Marked Souls
short_description: A psychological horror visual novel where you play as a teenager sent to a mysterious boarding school after losing his parents. Make choices that alter your fate, uncover dark secrets, and face supernatural trials to survive the ancient mystical forces.
detailed_description:
MARKED SOULS

"Marked Souls" is a mystical visual novel with elements of psychological horror where you play as Igor, a teenager who lost his parents in a car accident and was sent to a boarding school deep in the forest.

What begins as a normal adjustment to a new life quickly turns into a series of mysterious and frightening events. Igor and his new friends become entangled in an ancient mystical story that will test their friendship, courage, and willpower.

Immerse yourself in the dark atmosphere of the old mansion, uncover secrets of the past, and face paranormal phenomena. Make choices that will affect your relationships with other characters and determine your fate.

KEY FEATURES:

  • Compelling storyline with elements of mysticism and psychological horror

  • Branching dialogue system and choices that affect the game's ending

  • Challenging trials for the main characters

  • Atmospheric visual style and sound design

  • Multiple endings depending on your decisions

  • Deep character development and backstories

name: Detective 26
short_description: DETECTIVE 26 is a relaxing, turn-based mystery board game for 5-minute investigations. Roll dice and traverse low-poly maps to gather clues. Use logic to unmask the Wanted before turns run out! Level up your rank, unlock new content, and master the art of being a true detective!
detailed_description:
The Case is Open. The Clock is Ticking. Can You Unmask the Wanted?

Step into the charming, colorful world of DETECTIVE 26, where every new game is a fresh, intriguing mystery waiting to be solved. This is your personal, quick and cozy investigative board game - designed to be the perfect blend of relaxing strategy and rewarding achievement. Whether you have five minutes between tasks or a quiet evening to solve a string of mysteries, this is your personal investigative retreat.

A Tabletop Experience

Experience the satisfying flow of a physical board game from a bird’s-eye view. Roll the dice to traverse a colorful, tile-based world where every move matters. Collect clues and uncover the evidence you need to solve the case.

Coffee-Break Mysteries

A full investigation in DETECTIVE 26 takes just 2 to 5 minutes. Perfect for short bursts of downtime. Whether you are waiting for dinner or a multiplayer lobby to fill - there is enough time to sneak in a case or two.

The Thrill of the Chase

A Wanted identity is hidden among a pool of suspects. Your mission is to gather enough evidence to identify it.

  • Collect Clues: Find clue cards scattered across randomized maps, that reveal the target’s appearance, habits, or secrets.

  • Eliminate Suspects: Use your deductive skills to cross-reference evidence and narrow down the field.

  • The Turn Counter: Strategy is key, plan your moves! The clock is ticking down with every move. Will you find the final clue or take a calculated risk and accuse early?

Become a Master Investigator

Every successful accusation earns you points to increase your Investigator Rank.

  • Unlock Content: Unlock new maps, abilities, cosmetic skins and many more.

  • Fresh Challenges: Experience randomized map layouts and suspect placements in every session, ensuring no two cases are ever the same.

  • Track Success: Monitor your win streaks and career statistics as you rise from a rookie observer to a world-class master of deduction and unlock achievements.

The next case is waiting for you…

Content Overview

  • Maps: 10+ unique maps with random map generation, taking place across space and time: Small Neighbourhoods in 2026, Castles in 1426, …

  • Suspects: 50 suspects and 10 suspect sets

  • Abilities: 7 special abilities, each altering the way how the game is played

  • Achievements: 10+ Steam achievements

  • Player Models: 30+ models, like: Banana, Beer, Cow, Statue, Bubble Milk Tea, Car, Ramen Bowl, …

  • More Customization: Colors, Carpets, Chairs, Tables, Decorative Props, Icons

name: Melody Friends
short_description: 🩷 Any song on your PC works! Difficulties are generated automatically, and you can press any key you like. It's a super casual rhythm game anyone can just jump into 🎶 Play through songs in your own style with 5 unique friends! 60+ built-in songs included too 🌸✨
detailed_description:
♥


About the Game

Pick a song from your PC. Your cute little friends will start playing right away!⚡

  • Auto-generated charts: Add any song and difficulties from easy to hard are generated automatically!

  • Play however you want: Press any key you like. There's no right or wrong way to play!

  • Your style, your sound: Each of the 5 friends has their own unique sound. Which keys to press is entirely up to you!

  • Auto Play included: Let your friends take the wheel and perform on their own!

  • Built-in songs: 60+ hand-picked songs that fit the vibe, included right out of the box!

  • Customization: Swap out character outfits and PERFECT effects to match your style.

  • Steam Workshop support: Use custom skins from the Workshop to change characters and button sounds!🌈

Pick the vibe — Upbeat, Chill, Cute, or Intense! 🎧

Each song comes with its own cover art featuring the adorable WINE characters. Find the perfect track for your mood!

Your song can be anywhere — just find it in the browser and you're good to go!🗂️

No complicated setup. Just pick a song and multiple difficulties are ready to play!

Press a key and your friends go 'boing!' — play it your way! 🎀

You don't have to be perfect. Just press whatever feels right!

More features!

  • Supports a wide range of resolutions from 4:3 to 21:9!

  • Remap each character to any key you want. Set it up your way!

  • Use the in-game browser to navigate to any folder, or just type the path directly!

  • There's also a mode where no notes appear — just play freely to the music!

  • Built-in BPM metronome! If you don't know your song's BPM, you can set it manually.

  • There's a score, but no game over. Chill out or go for ALL PERFECT — up to you!

  • Hit multiple keys on a single note? Totally fine. Play the same song a different way every time!

  • Achievements are in too! Keep an eye out for the hidden weird ones.

name: Ice Slider
short_description: Ice Slider is a game by Shining Watermelon Studios where you play as a hiker named Rob who enters Icy Cave. A cave with a Gauntlet of Ice Puzzles, in which he has to complete to exit. Play as Rob as he goes through this gauntlet of puzzles. Each Level
detailed_description:
About Ice Slider

Ice Slider is a game by Shining Watermelon Studios where you play as a hiker named Rob who enters Icy Cave. A cave with a Gauntlet of Ice Puzzles, in which he has to complete to exit. Play as Rob as he goes through this gauntlet of puzzles. Each Level contains new challenges using Walls and other obstacles like Dirt, which stops you in your tracks, Move Tiles, which spin you in their specified direction, and Rotate Tiles, which spin you randomly based on their current direction. The game contains 20 base game levels for you to explore.
about_the_game:
About Ice Slider

Ice Slider is a game by Shining Watermelon Studios where you play as a hiker named Rob who enters Icy Cave. A cave with a Gauntlet of Ice Puzzles, in which he has to complete to exit. Play as Rob as he goes through this gauntlet of puzzles. Each Level contains new challenges using Walls and other obstacles like Dirt, which stops you in your tracks, Move Tiles, which spin you in their specified direction, and Rotate Tiles, which spin you randomly based on their current direction. The game contains 20 base game levels for you to explore.

name: Black Mask of Cernunnos
short_description: When an ancient deity is summoned to aid in a war, betrayal of his trust will have rippling effects for the people, and the young prince who finds himself subsequently bound to the creature.
detailed_description:
In the ancient past it was said that a mighty empire existed which controlled the entire with an iron fist, yet through the passage of time the empire became cruel and corrupt to those within its borders, igniting the flames of hatred within one who burnt everything the group. Now centuries later, the people not burned by the flames of hatred have built up a new society, one in which is at the crossroads of a change which will shake the entire world. In the center of the storm is a young prince by the name of Niall, a young prince of the great King Duncan, who will have to carve a path for himself from the world. At his back will stand his trusted servant, Aodh, who will open the doors of the world for him in order to show his prince the truth that has been outside of his purview. 

=======================================

     This game is a 2D fantasy game in the style of the Final Fantasy series of games with a heavy, plot drive narrative mixed with strong homoerotic elements.

     Players will enjoy a vast 2D open world which they will slowly be able to traverse as the story progresses, allowing them to encounter various hidden treasures (by way of found treasure maps), side quests, and smaller hidden storyline which detail more of the struggles of the land at the current time in history.

     Combat is also a part of the game, specifically in the vein of being turn-based, where up to four characters will be able to fight on screen at any give time. Players will also be able to transform the main character into a fighting hound by way of a special mask given to them by the titular Cernunnos.

   Enjoy a beautiful world filled with life as you travel with your companions, all with their own hurdles and complications, many of which are plotting to undermine the current order of the society. 

- Contains Fantasy Violence, Strong Language, Strong Sexual Content

=======================================

- Turn Based Combat

- Multiple Bad Endings

- Playtime = 10+ hrs

- This game features Ai. artwork and animations

=======================================

name: Hellraid
short_description: Hellraid is a unique mix of melee, magic and ranged combat and can be played both in single-player and 2-4 player co-op.
detailed_description:
A dark fantasy action game from Techland, the company behind Dying Light, the Dead Island and the Call of Juarez series. Hellraid is a unique mix of melee, magic and ranged combat and can be played both in single-player and 2-4 player co-op.

Join a group of fierce combatants trying to stop the demonic invasion and close the gates of Hell in the thrilling Story Mode. Master the levels, collect points, and climb up leaderboards in the highly replayable and challenging Mission Mode, or fight for your survival against hordes of enemies in the nightmarishly hard Arena Mode.

Create your character and customize it with a variety of accessories, clothes and armors. Develop a master demon slayer tailored to your playstyle. Combine active and passive abilities from a vast class-free skill tree divided into intertwined branches of combat, magic, and agility.

Slash enemies with one-handed swords, crush their bones with two-handed hammers, or cut in half with powerful axes. Diverse fighting styles for different weapons, shields, counter-attacks, parrying and dashing abilities make the melee combat of Hellraid both complex and immersive.

Cast powerful offensive spells, such as lightning bolts, fire balls, curses, and deadly area spells. Possess minds of your enemies and use defensive magic to heal your teammates. Eliminate opponents from afar with crossbows, throwing knives and explosives.

The game will be released in Steam Early Access in Autumn 2014.

Embark on a bloody Hellraid


  • Single-player and 2-4 player co-op gameplay in all modes
  • Three diverse game modes: Story, Mission, and Arena
  • Immersive combat system with melee, magic, and ranged weapons
  • Character customization and a vast class-free skill tree to develop a master demon slayer tailored to your playstyle
  • Advanced weapon crafting system
  • Adaptive enemy AI

name: Chthonian TD
short_description: Fast-paced co-op action roguelite × tower defense. Fight escalating waves, risk resources in a dangerous mine, defeat the boss - then see how long you survive in Endless.
detailed_description:
Chthonian TD

A co-op action roguelite x tower defense game for 1–4 players.

Defend against escalating waves.
Descend into a crystal mine to grow stronger.
Face a powerful enemy that shifts the pace of the run.
If you survive - push into optional Endless Mode.

Short runs. Constant pressure. No autopilot.

You’re Always in the Fight

This is not passive tower defense.

You move, aim, dodge, revive teammates and react under pressure while your defenses buy you time.

Towers strengthen your defense - player decisions still drive the run.

Every Run Evolves

Level-ups offer upgrade cards that reshape your build.

Some make you safer.
Some reward greed.
Some push the run toward instability.

Your build changes how the game feels.
No two runs play the same.

Power Has a Price

Stay above and hold the line.

Or descend into the mine to accelerate your growth.

Mining fuels stronger builds - but leaving at the wrong time can cost the run.

Greed is always a decision.

Four Roles. One Team.

Fighter - controls space and absorbs pressure
Miner - accelerates economy and scaling
Engineer - stabilizes lanes and strengthens defenses
Medic - prevents collapse when mistakes happen

XP is shared. Builds diverge. Survival is collective.

New Depths Await

The Abandoned Mine is only the beginning.

Survive runs to unlock new regions:

  • Forgotten Ruins

  • Frozen Caverns

  • Molten Depths

Each descent brings new enemies, new pressure, and a different battlefield.

Early Access Features

  • 1–4 player online co-op

  • ~15 minute structured runs

  • Two map styles with distinct pacing

  • Four regions to fight through

  • A powerful mid-run enemy encounter

  • Optional Endless Mode

  • Card-based progression each run

  • Persistent upgrades between runs

  • No friendly fire

Vision

Chthonian TD is built around one idea:

Relentless action, meaningful choices, and co-op that actually demands teamwork.

Fight above. Mine below. Survive together.

name: Bobo in Hell
short_description: Survive hell in this Roguelike Deckbuilder that features card battles with an in-depth auto-battler-esque synergy and combo system. Help Bobo, the little penguin, recruit allies and face the many horrors that await him on his journey to save his friends.
detailed_description:
Survive hell in this Roguelike Deckbuilder that features card battles with an in-depth auto-battler-esque synergy and combo system. Help Bobo, our little penguin, recruit allies and face the many horrors that await him on his journey to save his friends.

Recruit powerful allies and create your team composition navigating an in-depth synergy system! Arrange powerful combinations to exploit and escalate your power level to cruise through the gates of hell.

Relinquish your foes and pick up powerful items to fine-tune your composition. Carefully weigh the pros and cons of each artifact and use unique interactions to give you the edge.

Find your way through the circles of hell under the guidance of our local, friendly red-hooded figure. Beware of your choices, penguin, as decision-making is the deciding factor between facing the unpleasant and the unrelenting.

Bobo In Hell at release will ship with: 

  • 165+ character cards.

  • 50+ unique items.

  • 50+ action cards.

  • 20+ unique enemies.

  • 20+ synergetic archetypes.

  • Hundreds of different viable builds and combinations.
